summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SMA-AI Dev Workspace iteration 2 - Perfect results with 100% backend and 100% frontend success. All new features verified including Open WebUI integration, Emergent Universal Key, and resolved API credit issues.
passed_tests: Models API returns both claude-opus-4-6 and claude-sonnet-4-6
Conversation CRUD operations (create, list, get, delete) all working perfectly
Settings GET returns all fields including openwebui_base_url and openwebui_api_key_masked
Settings PUT successfully updates openwebui_base_url and openwebui_api_key
Chat streaming POST with short message 'Say hello in 3 words' works with SSE
Frontend dark theme loads correctly (rgb(5,5,5) background)
Sidebar visible with SMA-AI v2.0 branding
Model selector dropdown shows Claude Opus 4.6 option with provider icons
New Chat button creates conversations and updates sidebar
Settings modal opens and shows all 3 provider sections
Claude API section with Emergent Universal Key toggle working
Ollama section with URL input field functional
Open WebUI section with URL and API key inputs working
Conversation clicking in sidebar loads messages successfully
Messages display with proper markdown and code syntax highlighting
Code copy button functionality working correctly
Real-time chat streaming and message display working perfectly
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (9/9 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (all UI features working)
action_item_for_main_agent: Excellent work! The application is working perfectly with 100% success rate. All new features including Open WebUI integration, Emergent Universal Key toggle, and comprehensive settings modal are fully functional. Previous API credit issue completely resolved.
